Package microui.core.base

Class SpatialView

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
Direct Known Subclasses:
ContentView, GraphicsBuffer, ImageBuffer
public abstract class SpatialView extends View
Abstract base class for GUI components that have spatial properties (position and dimensions). Provides comprehensive management of position, size, constraints, and animation capabilities.

SpatialView extends View to add spatial properties and constraints system. It manages: - Position (x, y coordinates) and dimensions (width, height) - Minimum and maximum size constraints - Negative dimensions handling - Spatial animation through SpatialAnimator - Update hooks with configurable timing modes

See Also:
  • View
  • SpatialAnimator
  • SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode

    SpatialView.HooksUpdateMode
    Update modes for change hooks with different timing intervals.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SpatialView()
    Constructs a SpatialView at origin (0,0) with default minimum size 1.
    SpatialView(float x, float y, float width, float height)
    Constructs a SpatialView with specified position and dimensions.
    SpatialView(SpatialView spatialView)
    Constructs a SpatialView by copying properties from another SpatialView.

  • Constructor Details

    • SpatialView

      public SpatialView(float x, float y, float width, float height)
      Constructs a SpatialView with specified position and dimensions.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate
      y - the y-coordinate
      width - the width
      height - the height

    • SpatialView

      public SpatialView(SpatialView spatialView)
      Constructs a SpatialView by copying properties from another SpatialView.
      Parameters:
      spatialView - the SpatialView to copy from (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if spatialView is null

    • SpatialView

      public SpatialView()
      Constructs a SpatialView at origin (0,0) with default minimum size 1.

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the SpatialView and manages update hooks and animations. Overrides parent draw method to add spatial update logic.

    • getSpatialAnimator

      public final SpatialAnimator getSpatialAnimator()
      Returns the spatial animator associated with this view.
      Returns:
      the spatial animator, or null if not set

    • setSpatialAnimator

      public final void setSpatialAnimator(SpatialAnimator spatialAnimator)
      Sets a spatial animator for this view.
      Parameters:
      spatialAnimator - the spatial animator to set (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if spatialAnimator is null

      maxWidth - the maximum width
      maxHeight - the maximum height

      public final void setMinMaxSize(float size)
      Sets both minimum and maximum size constraints to the same value.
      Parameters:
      size - the size for both minimum and maximum constraints

      Checks if dimension constraints are enabled.
